title: How to get the MOST out of your N/A tib!
author: komokazi
notes: Only page 1 scraped (32 posts). OP is a comprehensive NA V6 mod guide covering intake, exhaust, headers, cams, ported heads, BBTB, intake manifolds, pulleys, fuel tuner, motor mounts, flywheel/clutch, ECU flash, compression, and weight reduction. Thread dates show OP created 2007-09-08 but forum metadata shows 2018-08-26 (likely thread bump/edit date). Stickied guide thread.
